name: Cirrus CI
description: Cirrus CI — Cloud-native CI service with support for Linux, macOS, Windows, and FreeBSD using YAML-based pipelines.

seo.title: Cirrus CI — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Cirrus CI: Cirrus CI — Cloud-native CI service with support for Linux, macOS, Windows, and FreeBSD using YAML-based pipelines.

when_to_use: Cloud-native CI for Linux, macOS, Windows, FreeBSD
Persistent worker support for self-hosted CI on own infra
Task parallelism with Docker containers or VMs
Free tier for open-source projects with YAML pipelines

pros: Real macOS, Linux, Windows, FreeBSD runners in one service
Clean YAML config with powerful matrix support
Fast startup times on Google Cloud backend
cons: Private repo pricing changed and broke trust for some
Docs can be thin for advanced scenarios
review.verdict: The best CI for cross-OS testing, especially if you actually need FreeBSD or macOS M-series.
review.best_for: OSS projects and cross-platform tools needing FreeBSD, macOS, and Linux in one pipeline.
review.not_for: Teams fully inside GitHub who want the default Actions workflow.
